title: Gate-result recency predicate with fresh-evidence example
description:
Add a predicate on gate-result freshness so rulesets can require recent evidence before completion, and ship a fresh-evidence example ruleset.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Rules can assert that an issue's gate results are no older than a configured age (evaluated against the recorded gate timestamps)
- [ ] A stale or missing gate result yields a finding naming the gate and its age
- [ ] An example ruleset under docs/examples/ demonstrates fresh-evidence-before-done, blocking via transition enforcement
- [ ] Behavior is deterministic and testable (clock injection or equivalent; no hidden wall-clock reads in the pure engine)
